title: लक्ष्मी पञ्चरत्नम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री लक्ष्मी पञ्चरत्नम् ॥

पद्मानने पद्मविपद्मपत्रे पद्मप्रिये पद्मदलायताक्षि।
विश्वप्रिये विष्णुमनोऽनुकूले त्वत्पादपद्मं मयि सन्निधत्स्व॥ १॥

पद्मालये पद्मिनि पद्महस्ते परात्परे दुर्गतिनाशयित्रि।
सर्वापदां हारिणि सर्वपूज्ये श्रीपद्मनाभप्रिये सन्निधत्स्व॥ २॥

सरोजवासे सरसिजनेत्रे सरोजहस्ते सरसिजसेव्ये।
सरोजभूषे सरसिजगन्धे सरोजमाले सुमुखी नमस्ते॥ ३॥

नमस्त्रिलोक्यैकनमस्कृतायै नमः क्षीरसागरकन्यकायै।
नमो नारायणवक्षःस्थलायै नमो महालक्ष्म्यै नमो नमस्ते॥ ४॥

सर्वसौभाग्यजनन्यै सर्वसम्पत्करीश्वरी।
धनधान्यसमृद्ध्यर्थं श्रीलक्ष्मीं शरणं गताः॥ ५॥

लक्ष्मीपञ्चरत्नमिदं श्रद्धया यः पठेन्नरः।
सर्वसम्पत्समृद्धः स्यात् लक्ष्मीकृपां लभेद् ध्रुवम्॥

॥ इति श्री लक्ष्मी पञ्चरत्नम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
transliteration:
|| Shri Lakshmi Pancharatnam ||

Padmanane Padmavipa Padmapatre Padmapriye Padmadalayatakshi |
Vishwapriye Vishnumanoanukule Tvatpadapadmam Mayi Sannidhatsva || 1 ||

Padmalaye Padmini Padmahaste Paratpare Durgatinashayitri |
Sarvapadam Harini Sarvapujye Shripadmanabhapriye Sannidhatsva || 2 ||

Sarojavase Sarasijanatre Sarojaahaste Sarasijasevye |
Sarojabhushe Sarasijagandhe Sarojamale Sumukhi Namaste || 3 ||

Namas Trilokaikanamaskriitayai Namah Kshirasagarakanyakayai |
Namo Narayanavakshahsthalayai Namo Mahalakshmyai Namo Namaste || 4 ||

Sarvasaubhagyajananyai Sarvasampatkareshvari |
Dhanadhanyasamriddhyartham Shrilakshmim Sharanam Gatah || 5 ||

LakshmiPancharatnam Idam Shraddhaya Yah Pathen Narah |
Sarvasampatsamriddhah Syat Lakshmikripam Labhed Dhruvam ||

|| Iti Shri Lakshmi Pancharatnam Sampurnam ||
hindiMeaning:
हे पद्ममुखी, पद्मप्रिया, विष्णुमनोऽनुकूला — अपने चरणकमल मुझ पर स्थापित करो।

हे पद्मालया, पद्मिनी, दुर्गतिनाशिनी, सर्वापद्हारिणी — आप विराजें।

सरोजवास, सरोजनेत्र, सरोजहस्ता, सुमुखी को नमस्कार।

त्रिलोकनमस्कृता, क्षीरसागरकन्या, नारायणवक्षःस्थला महालक्ष्मी को नमन।

श्रद्धा से पढ़ने वाला सर्वसम्पत्समृद्ध होता है और लक्ष्मीकृपा पाता है।
benefits: Five jewel-verses of Goddess Lakshmi for wealth
Invokes all forms of prosperity and good fortune
Grants abundance of wealth, grains, and resources
Removes poverty and all forms of deprivation
Ideal for Friday worship and Diwali Lakshmi Puja
description: Among the most cherished prayers to Goddess Lakshmi, Lakshmi Pancharatnam (लक्ष्मी पञ्चरत्नम्) stands as five gems of devotional verses. This sacred composition is sourced from Adi Shankaracharya and continues to inspire devotees worldwide. Regular recitation is believed to invoke all forms of prosperity and good fortune, remove poverty and all forms of deprivation, and grant abundance of wealth, grains, and resources. Recitation is particularly auspicious on Friday (Shukravar) and during Diwali, Sharad Purnima, and Akshaya Tritiya. At 5 verses long, the recitation takes roughly 3 minutes, making it accessible for regular devotional use. On this page, you can read the complete Lakshmi Pancharatnam in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Lakshmi Pancharatnam in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Five jewel-verses of Goddess Lakshmi for wealth and prosperity.
